name: @onderling/app-scaffold
description: SP-10 v0 — a pure manifest→app scaffolder. Takes an app manifest + a `requires` capability list (SP-9 vocabulary), validates the requires, and returns a runnable app skeleton (package.json + createAgent entry + one wireSkill stub per manifest operation) as path→content strings. PURE codegen — a `writer` may be injected to also write to disk, but the core is string-returning + testable.
